tailored_bullets: Designed and deployed SPL-based detection dashboards monitoring login trends, IP anomalies, and event volume across enterprise systems.
Assisted in security monitoring and log analysis to identify abnormal authentication behavior and potential indicators of compromise.
Developed and enforced Windows LAPS policies across Active Directory and hybrid environments, reducing credential exposure risk across 500+ endpoints.
resume_overrides.reframing_strategy: SIEM emphasis — prioritized Splunk detection metrics and SOC workflow outcomes.

short_essays.why_this_role: This role aligns with my Splunk SOC work and passion for detection engineering.
short_essays.relevant_experience: I have hands-on experience building SPL detection dashboards and analyzing logs for abnormal authentication behavior.

achievement_mappings.evidence: SPL-based detection dashboards improving threat visibility and accelerating incident triage

sandbox_project.title: FinServ SOC Detection Tuning Lab
sandbox_project.problem_statement: A financial services SOC is drowning in brute-force and impossible-travel alerts with noisy thresholds.
sandbox_project.technical_case_study: Tune SPL correlation searches, layer risk scoring, and automate triage playbooks to reduce analyst fatigue while maintaining detection coverage.

sandbox_assets.title: Brute Force Detection
sandbox_assets.description: SPL search identifying failed login spikes by source IP
sandbox_assets.content:
index=winevent sourcetype=WinEventLog:Security EventCode=4625
| stats count as failures by src_ip, user
| where failures > 10
| sort - failures

sandbox_assets.title: Impossible Travel
sandbox_assets.description: KQL query correlating sign-in geography anomalies
sandbox_assets.content:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize Locations = make_set(Location) by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where array_length(Locations) > 1

sandbox_assets.title: Incident Response Script
sandbox_assets.content:
# Hermes IR Triage — read-only
$host = $env:COMPUTERNAME
Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 15
Get-WinEvent -LogName Security -MaxEvents 20 | Format-Table TimeCreated, Id, Message -AutoSize

sandbox_assets.title: IAM Rules
sandbox_assets.description: Sample RBAC schema for SOC analyst least-privilege

capstone_mappings.achievement: Hermes autonomous application engine with hardened SQLite state
